case_title: BANK OF AMERICA VS. ANTHONY CHENG et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-07-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
